name: @telenow/courier-app
description: Recover failed deliveries (NDR) and cut RTO with AI voice calls. When Shiprocket or Delhivery reports a non-delivery attempt, Telenow auto-phones the customer with a natural multilingual AI voice agent (English, Hindi, more) to reschedule or fix the address, writes the outcome back to the NDR record, and can ask the courier to re-attempt — no glue code. Free app; requires a Telenow account billed on usage.
